_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in providing analysis on target-related matters (e.g., language, cultural, communications).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.570), LS-S-005 (LS, cosine: 0.567).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.604). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, skill]. DCWF-only terms [communications, cultural, language, matters, providing, related] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.867, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in providing analysis on target-related matters (e.g., language, cultural," and "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.608 ≈ STS 0.604 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analysis, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [analysis, skill]. DCWF-only: [communications, cultural, language, matters, providing, related]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non].
